Relative to the current date (before 2026), this places the claim in the future, making the text factually impossible. Furthermore, the image shows generic debris (glass, wood, ornament) on a floor with a flashlight, which does not clearly identify the location as Golestan Palace or show the extent of a major blast damage described (shattered windows, arches).
